notes.en: **This build is only recommended for [C6] [[character:noelle]].** [[character:noelle]] DPS is best optimized at **[C6]** where converts an addtional 50% [[stat:def|DEF]] into [stat:atk|ATK]]. Her ability to sustain her team with shields, heals and AoE damage makes for a reliable DPS when your team is built around her.
1 / 2 Targets: **N1>N2>N3>N4>dash/hop**. This isn't always feasible due to cas time (as well as knockback issues).

With [[weapon:redhorn-stonethresher]], using [[ability:ca]] can become more effective. While spinning, opening and closing either the map, or Adventurer's Handbook once will alow you to bypass the 5 second restriction.
